faq.title: Frequent
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our process and services.

timeline.question: How long does an average project take?
timeline.answer: It depends on complexity. A corporate website typically takes 3-4 weeks, while a complex SaaS application can take 2-3 months.

cost.question: How is pricing calculated?
cost.answer: We provide custom quotes based on development time, feature complexity, and required design level. No hidden fees.

support.question: Do you offer post-launch support?
support.answer: Yes, we offer 30 days of free support to fix any bugs. Afterwards, we offer monthly maintenance packages.

tech.question: What technologies do you use?
tech.answer: We are experts in React, Node.js, and TypeScript for web, and React Native or Swift/Kotlin for mobile.

seo.question: Is SEO included?
seo.answer: All our sites are technically optimized for SEO (speed, tags, structure). We also offer advanced SEO copywriting services.

process.question: What is your development process?
process.answer: We follow an agile methodology with 4 key phases: audit & strategy, UX/UI design, iterative development, and launch with ongoing support. Each phase includes client validation.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept bank transfers, credit cards, and PayPal. Payment is typically split into milestones: 30% upfront, 40% at mid-project, and 30% upon delivery.

design.question: How does the design process work?
design.answer: We start with wireframes and user flows, then create high-fidelity mockups in Figma. You validate each step before we move to development.

security.question: How do you handle data security?
security.answer: Security is built into every project from day one. We implement HTTPS, data encryption, GDPR compliance, and follow OWASP best practices.

revision.question: How many revisions are included?
revision.answer: Each project phase includes up to 2 rounds of revisions. Additional revisions can be arranged at a transparent hourly rate.

cta.title: Have more questions?
cta.subtitle: Our team is here to help clarify your needs.

q1.question: Do you charge hourly or fixed price?
q1.answer: We prefer fixed pricing to guarantee budget. For maintenance, we work with hour banks.

q2.question: Can I change plans mid-project?
q2.answer: Absolutely. Our offers are scalable. You only pay the prorated difference.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your personal data with the utmost rigor.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Soleon Tech, protecting your personal data is an absolute priority. This privacy policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights as a user.

data_collection.title: Data Collected
data_collection.content: We only collect information necessary for the proper functioning of our services:
details: Identity information: name, first name, email address
Navigation data: cookies, pages visited, session duration
Communication data: messages sent via the contact form
Technical information: IP address, browser, operating system

data_usage.title: Use of Data
data_usage.content: Your data is used exclusively for:
details: Responding to your requests and providing our services
Improving the user experience of our site
Sending relevant communications (with your consent)
Analyzing traffic and optimizing our performance

data_sharing.title: Data Sharing
data_sharing.content: We never sell your personal data. It may be shared only with:
details: Our technical service providers (hosting, analytics) under strict contract
Legal authorities in case of legal obligation
With your explicit consent for selected partners

cookies.title: Cookies & Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies to improve your browsing. You can manage your preferences at any time via your browser settings. Types of cookies used:
details: Essential cookies: necessary for the site to function
Analytical cookies: to understand site usage
Preference cookies: to remember your choices (language, etc.)

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
details: Right of access: consult your personal data
Right to rectification: correct your information
Right to erasure: delete your data
Right to portability: retrieve your data
Right to object: refuse certain processing

contact.title: Questions?
contact.description: For any questions regarding your personal data, please do not hesitate to contact us.

terms_conditions.title: Terms & Conditions
terms_conditions.subtitle: The rules and conditions for using our digital services.

general.title: General Provisions
general.content: These General Terms of Use (GTU) and Sale (GTS) govern the access and use of services offered by Soleon Tech. By using our services, you accept all of these conditions.

services.title: Description of Services
services.content: Soleon Tech offers digital design and development services including:
details: Custom website and mobile application creation
UX/UI design and visual identity
SaaS application development
Technical maintenance and support
SEO and performance optimization

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.content: Access to certain services may require creating an account. You agree to:
details: Provide accurate and up-to-date information
Maintain the confidentiality of your credentials
Immediately notify any unauthorized use
Not share your account with third parties

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
details: Soleon Tech commits to providing professional quality services
The client provides necessary content and materials in a timely manner
The client validates deliverables according to agreed deadlines
Any substantial modification may result in a pricing adjustment

limitations.title: Limitations of Liability
limitations.content: Within the limits authorized by law:
details: Soleon Tech cannot be held responsible for service interruptions beyond its control
Our liability is limited to the amount paid for the service concerned
We do not guarantee specific commercial results
The client is responsible for backing up their data

jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction & Applicable Law
jurisdiction.content: These conditions are governed by French law. In case of dispute:
details: An amicable resolution will be sought as a priority
Otherwise, French courts will have jurisdiction
Compliance with GDPR and European regulations

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Conditions
acceptance.content: The use of our services implies full acceptance of these GTU/GTS. If you do not accept these conditions, please do not use our services. We reserve the right to modify these conditions at any time, with prior notification to users.
